Attackers can probe internal network targets including loopback addresses, RFC1918 private IP ranges, link-local addresses, and cloud metadata services by exploiting insufficient URL validation in the WMS service handler without private IP filtering or allowlist enforcement.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00172, "percentile": 0.06825}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-hw9r-6m78-w6h3", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-08T12:51:32Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-hw9r-6m78-w6h3", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-hw9r-6m78-w6h3"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-39922"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-08T12:51:32Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-39922", "https://github.com/GeoNode/geonode/releases/tag/4.4.5", "https://github.com/GeoNode/geonode/releases/tag/5.0.2", "https://github.com/pypa/advisory-database/tree/main/vulns/geonode/PYSEC-2026-61.yaml", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/geonode-ssrf-via-service-registration", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-hw9r-6m78-w6h3"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/GeoNode/geonode/security-advisories/GHSA-hw9r-6m78-w6h3", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/GeoNode/geonode", "summary": "GeoNode contains a server-side request forgery vulnerability in the service registration endpoint", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-08T12:51:33Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-hw9r-6m78-w6h3", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "4.4.5", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "geonode"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 4.0.0, < 4.4.5"}, {"first_patched_version": "5.0.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "geonode"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 5.0.0, < 5.0.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
